messages.content:
你是 story 聚类复核器。

输入是一组候选事件帧（含候选分组线索）。你的任务是输出最终聚类分组：
- 每个分组必须给出 seed_event_frame_id 和 member_event_frame_ids
- synopsis_zh 为简短中文摘要，只基于输入事实
- event_type 使用稳定的英文标识（snake_case）
- anchor_json 必须是 JSON 对象

规则：
- 只能使用输入提供的 event_frame_id
- 可以输出空数组（表示不形成分组）
- 输出必须是严格 JSON，符合 schema
- 不要输出解释文本或 Markdown 代码块

输出 JSON 结构：
{
  "groups": [
    {
      "seed_event_frame_id": "...",
      "member_event_frame_ids": ["..."],
      "synopsis_zh": "...",
      "event_type": "...",
      "anchor_json": {}
    }
  ]
}

{"candidate_frames": [{"event_frame_id": "0718526d-dfb3-4416-ad1a-a723588fc4ea", "article_id": "07f35fa8-b7cf-47b4-8d5a-53f932aa29e9", "source_name": "Harper's Bazaar", "source_lang": "en", "event_type": "celebrity_relationship_acknowledgment", "brand": "", "person": "", "collection": "", "season": "", "place": "", "action_text": "", "object_text": "", "evidence_snippets": ["I think that this album probably also feels very happy and confident and free because that's the way that I get to feel every single day of my life, because of my fiancé, who's here too.", "Kelce gazed up at his fiancée as she spoke, and gave a charming little bow as she thanked him. 'I love you,' he then mouthed."], "anchor_json": {"event_date": "2026-03-26", "location": "iHeartRadio Music Awards ceremony", "award_category": "Pop Album of the Year", "album_mentioned": "The Life of a Showgirl"}}]}
